description: Split layout — left copy, right animated credit score dashboard preview. Immediately shows the product value.

css_layout_rules..hero-split: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; min-height: 100vh; align-items: center; padding: 7rem 5rem 5rem; gap: 5rem;
css_layout_rules..hero-stats-row: display: flex; gap: 2rem; margin: 1.5rem 0; flex-wrap: wrap;
css_layout_rules..dashboard-preview-card: border-radius: 1.5rem; overflow: hidden; transform: perspective(1000px) rotateY(-5deg) rotateX(2deg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
css_layout_rules..features-alternating: padding: 6rem 5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6rem;
css_layout_rules..social-proof-grid: padding: 6rem 5rem; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem;
